name: Cajun Red Beans & Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the beans and drain well.
2. Cook in 5 cups of water for 50 minutes or until tender, adding the bay leaves.
3. Remove from heat and add onion, thyme, garlic, parsley, green pepper, and salt.
4. Simmer over medium-low heat for 15 to 20 minutes.
5. Stir in red miso and simmer for another 5 minutes.
6. Discard bay leaves.
7. Serve the beans over hot rice and garnish with scallions.
